title: Crispy Spanish Fries
description: A classic Spanish-inspired snack, these crispy fries are easy to make and delicious to eat. Serve with your favorite dipping sauce.
instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (180°C).
Peel the potatoes and cut them into long, thin strips.
Heat the stire oil in the pan to the correct temperature.
Add a handful of potato strips to the hot oil and fry until golden brown.
Remove the fries from the oil with a slotted spoon and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain.
Sprinkle the crisp salt over the fries to taste.
Repeat the frying process with the remaining potato strips.
Serve the crispy fries hot, garnished with minced garlic.
